bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Bow is dying to daggers at range despite defensive posture. Increasing kiteRangeBias to +2 creates safer distancing from melee. Slight aggression boost (0.8 → 0.85) counters passivity loss-spiral (only 33/200 wins). Disabling daggerFlank prevents wasted flank attempts when using bow — we don't wield

lessons: Bow has 2 wins in last 10 rounds — switch to grapple or sword when shield (437+ sightings) or staff (260+ sightings) dominate.
Shredder (daggers) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds (30, 31, 33) — daggers outperform bow in close quarters; avoid open areas and retreat if within 10m.
Staff users (Archmage, Reaper) killed you in rounds 26, 29, and 34 — never engage at range; close distance using cover or flanks to negate their AoE.
Shield users (Juggernaut) blocked all bow shots in rounds 32 and 35 — avoid chasing them; prioritize unshielded sword users, whom you’ve killed 8 times with 0 deaths in wins.
Grapple users (Scorpion) killed you in rounds 25 and 34 — avoid open areas; use walls and narrow corridors to limit their mobility and range.
Fast_zone modifier reduced survival time by 40% (round 28) — avoid prolonged engagements; prioritize quick kills or retreat immediately upon spawn.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple outperforms bow against dominant shield and staff users, and has higher mobility to counter daggers and close-range threats.

lessons: Bow has a 11% win rate (5/45) — it’s our most-used weapon but least effective; avoid relying on it outside fast_zone.
Sword users caused 8 of last 10 deaths — prioritize eliminating them with ranged fire before they close, especially in open terrain.
Valkyrie (spear) and Archmage (staff) killed us in 3 of last 5 rounds — both out-range or outmaneuver bow users; maintain distance and strafe unpredictably.
Fast_zone modifier is our only consistent advantage (6-0 in round 28) — actively seek and engage during this modifier; it nullifies melee advantage.
Shield users appeared in 4 of last 10 rounds and contributed to 3 deaths — avoid frontal engagements; flank or lure them into fast_zone or narrow corridors.
Deadeye, NeuralReaper, and GhostProtocol (all bow users) have killed us 15+ times combined — retreat to cover or high ground immediately on hearing bow draw.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has a 22% win rate (32/143) — over 4x higher than bow — and dominates in range and AoE, countering sword and bow users effectively.

lessons: Bow is your most effective weapon: 13 wins in 66 plays (19.7% win rate) and 13 kills, 2 deaths in last 5 rounds — maintain as primary weapon.
Sword users (Executioner, HexMind, Juggernaut, Viper, Warden, Lancer, Ranger, NeuralReaper) killed you in 8 of last 10 rounds — prioritize eliminating them with bow from distance before they close.
Executioner (sword) killed you 3 times in last 5 rounds — treat as high-priority target; eliminate immediately when spotted at range.
Grapple users (Hook) have killed you 149 times total — retreat instantly on sight; they bypass shield and close faster than you can react.
Shield has 0 wins in last 7 rounds and 10 wins in 85 total rounds — never use it; it is statistically the worst weapon in current meta.
Daggers users are prevalent (405+ sightings) and lethal in close quarters — avoid tight spaces and use bow to engage from open areas.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has the highest kill-to-death ratio (18 kills, 3 deaths) in recent rounds and is the only weapon with multiple wins in the last 5 rounds.
